creator: pgut001@cs.auckland.ac.nz
text: Final update (I hope): Tried with another SD card, this time a 16GB Sandisk, and it works as well.  So the problem really is that both the Pine eMMC *and* the Apacer SD are bad.  Given that the eMMC had malware on it when it arrived that's quite plausible for the eMMC, but I'm surprised at the Apacer, although admittedly they're not known for high-quality media.  I'll run both through a flash stress tester in a minute to see what turns up.
